---
id: create-mixtape-from-artist
title: "Create mixtape from artist"
description: "Creates a new mixtape seeded with tracks from the specified artist and returns an HTML fragment."

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Create mixtape from artist"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/library/artist/{id}/create-mixtape"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Creates a new mixtape seeded with tracks from the specified artist and returns an HTML fragment.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
